physical_source: Downloaded from Datum device after session
how_to_obtain: Receiver records raw satellite observations continuously from power-on to end of session. Download via USB or the Datum companion app after the survey. Recording must start before drone takeoff and continue past landing.
notes: Machine truth. Self-evidencing for completeness/format/environment. Antenna type and delta-H here serve as cross-checks against the user form.

physical_source: Exported from Datum device / companion app
how_to_obtain: Device firmware records a session log. Exported alongside the RINEX. Scoped (per dev spec) to completeness & power certification only: completed-normally, shutdown count, battery trace, end-time, download-confirmed.
notes: Only source that can certify clean termination. Nullable fields: null = unconfirmed (not bad). If file absent (abrupt death), integrity degrades to unconfirmed, never silently passes.

physical_source: Entered by operator in CB capture app at upload
how_to_obtain: Structured field form. Human-entered: antenna model/height/method/reference/count, monument facts, plus flight start/end UTC from the upload context. The form design itself is the safeguard against the #1 antenna-height blunder.
notes: Human input. Cannot verify correctness, only provenance, corroboration, and consistency with RINEX. Antenna type and height are cross-checked against the RINEX header.
